impact: This advances checkbox-181 by making syntax-preflight retry guidance deterministic and JSON-only, while constraining the next proposal to exactly one parser-bearing PP&D file or one daemon repair file before blocked domain work is retried.
summary: Add focused daemon prompt-scoping helper and coverage for syntax_preflight retry prompts.
target_task: Task checkbox-181: Add daemon prompt-scoping coverage proving syntax_preflight history for a PP&D domain task produces a JSON-only retry instruction limited to one parser-bearing file or one daemon repair file.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
